title: RYEAH R
wikitext:
[]: R...YEAH R?             Quote Post by skikes » Wed Aug 12, 2009 10:06 pm whats up with evangelion and the letter r? Examples: Evangelion Renewal Evangelion Rebuild Evangelion Rebirth Evangelion Revival and thats just the canon stuff... theres also EvaR, EVA re-take... whatever i could go on. So yeah, my point... Whats up with that? :s[/b]

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Aug 12, 2009 10:11 pm cuz it is lol === I dunno. I don't think it's anything to make a big deal over. EVA R, Re-take, Redeath are all fan made. Not all official thing Eva related titles have a title beginning with R. Also it isn't Evangelion: Rebirth it's DEATH and Rebirth so I don't think that shouldn't be included in your list R titles list. In conclusion: Not a big deal. Some of the titles are just like that.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Wed Aug 12, 2009 10:27 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: cuz it is lol === I dunno. I don't think it's anything to make a big deal over. EVA R, Re-take, Redeath are all fan made. Not all official thing Eva related titles have a title beginning with R. Also it isn't Evangelion: Rebirth it's DEATH and Rebirth so I don't think that shouldn't be included in your list R titles list. In conclusion: Not a big deal. Some of the titles are just like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Wed Aug 12, 2009 10:43 pm Actually, it's probably because you're overlooking an important vowel: "E". Rebirth, Renewal, Rebuild, Revival, Re-take, (etc.) are all 're-somethingrather', not just beginning with 'r'. "Re-" is a prefix used to signify something akin to 'again'. Seeing as how Renewal & Revival concern themselves with rehashing the source material, Rebuild is a remake, Re-take was a doujin about going back in time and redoing shit, and Rebirth is itself a word concerned with making everything new again (most of what EoE was concerned about), I'd say that the titles were pretty appropriate.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Aug 12, 2009 10:49 pm I think "Rebirth" had more to do with it being a double feature after "Death"

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Wed Aug 12, 2009 10:57 pm My point was that these titles wouldn't be just arbitrary alliterations. Yeah, Rebirth probably was named such because it's got a nice jingle to it (Death & Rebirth as opposed to Death & The END), but there's still some heavy rebirth stuff going on in EoE--and since EoE is Rebirth + The Rest, I just group the two together anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Aug 12, 2009 10:57 pm EVANGE R ION. Amirite? ;D

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Wed Aug 12, 2009 10:57 pm Lets not forget the joke "reprise of Evangelion". In b4 Tines and EVA-R

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Wed Aug 12, 2009 11:34 pm Neon Genesis Evangelion: Death and Яebirth Looks cooler, no?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Aug 12, 2009 11:35 pm skikes wrote: btw im now look for some deep meaningful answer to this like the letter r holds all the secrets to eva. its just friggin buggin me.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Aug 12, 2009 11:41 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: skikes wrote: btw im now look for some deep meaningful answer to this like the letter r holds all the secrets to eva. its just friggin buggin me.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Aug 12, 2009 11:44 pm Sachi wrote: There's no "L" sound in the Japanese language. Heh, you should've seen my relatives in Japan stumbling to say my name: Kyle. The "L" ends up sounding like an "R". Hence "Eng r ish or Evange r ion.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Wed Aug 12, 2009 11:48 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: You serious? That's like saying Ritsuko's birthmark/beauty mark has some deep meaning or the long elevator scene between Rei and Asuka had some hidden significance.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Aug 13, 2009 1:30 am Combs wrote: In b4 Tines and EVA-R

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Aug 13, 2009 2:01 am Simple answer: Anno is a pirate.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Aug 13, 2009 3:04 am Fazmotron wrote: Simple answer: Anno is a pirate.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Thu Aug 13, 2009 5:12 am Lets not forget iRon maiden/ giRRfRiend of steeR or second impRession is there any Eva title that doesn't have an R in it' besides the romanization/Kanji issues in the word evangelion? (besides sadamoto's manga) Mr. Tines wrote: ThePRPD already covered that one

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Thu Aug 13, 2009 9:56 am Combs wrote: Lets not forget the joke "reprise of Evangelion". In b4 Tines and EVA-R

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Aug 13, 2009 11:56 am whats up with evangelion and the letter r?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Aug 13, 2009 1:49 pm Re i, anyone?
